programs.title: BtN Newsbreak
programs.desc: Find out what's going on in the world with a news bulletin designed for children, featuring stories that are relevant and easy to understand.

programs.title: Phil Spencer: Secret Agent
programs.desc: In Staffordshire, Phil hopes to help Mark and Denise James find a buyer for their three bed semi. But Phil discovers a house full of clutter, a bathroom that's seen better days and a huge garden complete with cows. (Final).

programs.title: My Family
programs.desc: Desperation drives Susan to offer Nick a job at her tour company. Janey surprises everyone when her school wants to put her forward as an Oxbridge candidate, but Ben is not too impressed with her innovative study techniques.

programs.title: Shetland
programs.desc: A Met detective returns to Shetland on the trail of a vulnerable witness. DI Ruth Calder must team up with Tosh to find the girl before it's too late.

programs.title: Elementary
programs.desc: Sherlock helps a math genius from his network of \.

programs.title: ER
programs.desc: During the graveyard shift, Pratt treats a man who has lost the power of speech and a boy who has swallowed a quarter. Elsewhere, Abby has a frosty meeting with her ex-husband, while Elizabeth starts warming up to Dr. Dorset.
